reference: I am a twenty-four-year-old male. I have shortness of breath, and when I breathe in, my stomach is painful. After eating, I am experiencing heartburn. My left scrotum is painful, but I have had this before in two thousand and five. I am also having bumps on the head of the penis that keep on growing. What could it be?
text: I am a 24-year-old male. I have shortness of breath and when I breathe in, my stomach is painful. After eating, I am experiencing heartburn. My left scrotum is painful, but I have had this before in 2005. I am also having bumps on the head of the penis that keep on growing. What could it be?
